title: BlueLava
description: Made the Lava and Fire blue, mainly meant to be used for Hypixel SkyBlock.
body:
## What does this do?
All this does is changing the lava textures to look similar to water (like it turns lava blue). 

## What versions are supported? And are they gonna stay supported?
I will keep the support for both, the 1.8.9, the 1.21.5 version and higher, up - even if Hypixel turn SkyBlock fully away from 1.8.9 older ones. I will add support for more versions in the future if this is wanted.
